text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: miwi
Date: Tue Dec 15 15:03:43 UTC 2015
New revision: 403786
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/403786

Log:
  - Reset Maintainer
  - Set DEPRECATED

  The project www/py-satchmo seems ever more abandoned with each passing week.
  The main site fell off the internet a long while back however the user group
  remained active and there was occasional activity on the repo, however in recent
  postings to the user group it has been essentially dropped by the original team now
  and nobody appears keen to step up to take over.

  PR:		205091
  Submitted by:	maintainer
  Approved by:	mat (mentor)
  Differential Revision:	D4570

Changes:
  head/www/py-satchmo/Makefile
